description: Top-10 users by LiteLLM-computed dollar spend and token volume over the selected time range. Source of truth is LiteLLM's own metadata-only spend ledger (read-only grafana_ro PostgreSQL datasource); every query is bounded top-N SQL, never a high-cardinality metric label. Open WebUI traffic reports under its shared svc-open-webui service identity, not per browser user.

links.title: AI Gateway Model Usage and Cost

panels.description: LiteLLM-computed spend per authenticated key owner (LiteLLM_SpendLogs."user", alias from LiteLLM_UserTable when present).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(NULLIF(ut.user_alias, ''), NULLIF(sl."user", ''), 'unattributed') AS "user",
  SUM(sl.spend) AS "spend_usd"
FROM "LiteLLM_SpendLogs" sl
LEFT JOIN "LiteLLM_UserTable" ut ON ut.user_id = sl."user"
WHERE $__timeFilter(sl."startTime")
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 2 DESC
LIMIT 10

panels.title: Top 10 Users by Spend

panels.description: Total tokens (prompt + completion) per user over the selected range.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(NULLIF(ut.user_alias, ''), NULLIF(sl."user", ''), 'unattributed') AS "user",
  SUM(sl.total_tokens) AS "total_tokens"
FROM "LiteLLM_SpendLogs" sl
LEFT JOIN "LiteLLM_UserTable" ut ON ut.user_id = sl."user"
WHERE $__timeFilter(sl."startTime")
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 2 DESC
LIMIT 10

panels.title: Top 10 Users by Token Volume

panels.description: Spend over time for the ten users with the highest spend in the selected range (bounded CTE — the series set can never exceed eleven).

targets.rawSql:
WITH top_users AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(sl."user", ''), 'unattributed') AS user_id
  FROM "LiteLLM_SpendLogs" sl
  WHERE $__timeFilter(sl."startTime")
  GROUP BY 1
  ORDER BY SUM(sl.spend) DESC
  LIMIT 10
)
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(sl."startTime", $__interval),
  COALESCE(NULLIF(ut.user_alias, ''), NULLIF(sl."user", ''), 'unattributed') AS "metric",
  SUM(sl.spend) AS "spend_usd"
FROM "LiteLLM_SpendLogs" sl
LEFT JOIN "LiteLLM_UserTable" ut ON ut.user_id = sl."user"
WHERE $__timeFilter(sl."startTime")
  AND COALESCE(NULLIF(sl."user", ''), 'unattributed') IN (SELECT user_id FROM top_users)
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Top-10 User Spend Over Time

panels.description: Request, token, and spend detail for the top ten users by spend.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(NULLIF(ut.user_alias, ''), NULLIF(sl."user", ''), 'unattributed') AS "user",
  COUNT(*) AS "requests",
  SUM(sl.prompt_tokens) AS "prompt_tokens",
  SUM(sl.completion_tokens) AS "completion_tokens",
  SUM(sl.total_tokens) AS "total_tokens",
  SUM(sl.spend) AS "spend_usd"
FROM "LiteLLM_SpendLogs" sl
LEFT JOIN "LiteLLM_UserTable" ut ON ut.user_id = sl."user"
WHERE $__timeFilter(sl."startTime")
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 6 DESC
LIMIT 10

panels.title: Top 10 Users — Detail

panels.description: Share of input-side tokens served from the Anthropic prompt cache over the selected range (LiteLLM daily aggregates). Dollar spend on this dashboard already prices cache reads/writes correctly because it is LiteLLM's own computed spend, never tokens times a flat price.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  SUM(dus.cache_read_input_tokens)::float8 /
    NULLIF(SUM(dus.prompt_tokens + dus.cache_read_input_tokens + dus.cache_creation_input_tokens), 0)
    AS "cache_read_share"
FROM "LiteLLM_DailyUserSpend" dus
WHERE dus.date::date >= $__timeFrom()::date
  AND dus.date::date <= $__timeTo()::date

panels.title: Prompt-Cache Read Share of Input Tokens

panels.description: Daily input-side token split: fresh prompt tokens vs prompt-cache reads (priced ~0.1x) vs prompt-cache writes (priced ~1.25x). Surfaces the caching benefit without recomputing cost — spend panels stay on LiteLLM's cache-aware computed spend.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  dus.date::timestamp AS "time",
  SUM(dus.prompt_tokens) AS "fresh_prompt_tokens",
  SUM(dus.cache_read_input_tokens) AS "cache_read_tokens",
  SUM(dus.cache_creation_input_tokens) AS "cache_creation_tokens"
FROM "LiteLLM_DailyUserSpend" dus
WHERE dus.date::date >= $__timeFrom()::date
  AND dus.date::date <= $__timeTo()::date
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Cached vs Fresh Input Tokens (Daily)

title: AI Gateway Top Users
